ddt:Target.Name: CEPS_NSK_C1AHSEVO_V3.1
ddt:Target.Description:
History
V1 Database creation for CMFB#3 projects V2 : Addition of EPS Snapshots - Addition of F194 and F195 for B020 Software
V3.1 : Snapshot DID correction

Item.Text: Device and failure type ODB codding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
Missing or unreliable control requests for APA( AVM failure)
EPS Fault - Derating (H)EPS thermal protection Motor
EPS Fault - Derating (H)EPS thermal protection ECU
CAN Steering Wheel Angle Fault (STRG) Calibration Fault)
CAN Steering Wheel Angle Fault (STRG) (Signal Fault)
CAN G-sensor Fault1 (Signal Fault) - SWA Corrected
CAN BUSS OFF fault for functional DTC

Data.Name: DTCFormatIdentifier
Data.Comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

Data.Name: SessionName
Data.Comment: Diagnostic session values. See documentation for more information.
Data.Description:
[0x00] : ISO / SAE Reserved
[0x01] : Default session
[0x02] : Programming session
[0x03] : Extended diagnostic session
[0x04] : Safety system diagnostic session
[0x05 - 0x3F] : ISO / SAE Reserved
[0x40 - 0x5F] : Vehicle manufacturer specific
[0x60 - 0x7E] : System supplier specific
[0x7F] : ISO / SAE Reserved

Data.Name: AssistanceLevel
Data.Comment: cf. Spec DiagOnCAN: ASSISTANCE_LEVEL/Percentage of assistance avaliable

Data.Name: FilteredVehicleSpeed
Data.Comment: cf. Spec DiagOnCAN: FILTERED VEHICLE SPEED/HEPS calculation ; information in use

Data.Name: MotorTemperature
Data.Comment: cf. Spec DiagOnCAN: Motor_TEMPERATURE/Value of the temperature sensor

Data.Name: SystemMode
Data.Comment: cf. Spec DiagOnCAN: system mode (renault stateflow)

Data.Name: systemSupplierIdentifier
Data.Comment: Name and address information of the supplier.
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the system supplier name and address information.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the system supplier.

Data.Name: ECUSerialNumber
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the ECU (server) serial number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific.

Data.Name: vehicleManufacturerECUHardwareNumber
Data.Description:
This value shall be used by reading services to reference the vehicle-manufacturer-specific ECU (server) hardware number.

Record data content and format shall be serverspecific and defined by vehicle manufacturer.

Data.Name: systemSupplierECUSoftwareNumber
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the system supplier specific ECU (server) software number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the system supplier.

Data.Name: ElectricalMotorSpeed
Data.Comment: cf spec DiagONCAN Electrical Motor Speed

Data.Name: InternalFaultCode
Data.Comment: cf. Spec DiagOnCAN: INTERNAL_FAULT_CODE/Supplier fault code for this DTC

Data.Name: SAM_Job2Diag_Angle_Input
Data.Comment: Angle to simulate Job2Diag information sent by PEV station, in Plant Init SAM step

Data.Name: Front wheel circumference
Data.Comment: Value of DID to be added with offset value, which depends on EPS SysID

Data.Name: Status flag of CAN offset calculation
RoutineControlType
Data.Comment: Routine control type - VALUES OTHER THAN 1, 2 & 3 ARE RESERVED AND SHOULD NOT BE USED.

Data.Name: RoutineIdentifier
Data.Description:
Definition of RoutineControl

Data: RoutineIdentifierList

  Contains the list of all routine identifier that may be used with InputOutputControl service.
 
  Example:
  
    0x4501 - ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave

If some of these routine identifer have parameters, you should defined a data with the same name as the routine identifer followed by a dot and a text

  Example:
 
  Data: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Min
  Data: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Max
  Data: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Freq

Then, you should add theses data in the "Send tab" of the RoutineControl request, after the RoutineIdentifierList data.

Item.Text: Idle_stop and Torque_on flags enabled, others disabled
Coast_stop and Torque_on flags enabled, others disabled
Idle_stop and Assist_authorize flags enabled, others disabled
Coast_stop and Assist_authorize flags enabled, others disabled
Idle_stop and Coast_stop flags disabled, others enabled

Data.Name: ECU Temperature (main)
Data.Comment: cf. Spec DiagOnCAN: ECU_TEMPERATURE/Value of the temperature sensor

Data.Name: BatteryVoltage (main)
Data.Comment: cf. Spec DiagOnCAN: VOLTAGE_ST/Computer supply voltage

Data.Name: CAN Ignition status for state machine (main)
Activation of [BatteryDisconnection]
Data.Comment: configuration of presence of Deco Batt function

Data.Name: CAN Steering wheel angle sensor internal status

Item.Text: Not calibrated, no failure, not initialised

Request.Name: TesterPresent.WithResponse
Request.Comment: This request enable P2P tester present for tool (Screen, IOctl, ...)

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Programming
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.ExtendedDiagnostic
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Default
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportSnapshot
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

Request.Name: DataRead.MaxCPULoad
Request.Comment: Read max CPU load during mission

Request.Name: DataRead.CAN Ignition status for state machine (main)
Request.Comment: Read CAN Ignition status for state machine (main)

DataItem.Name: CAN Ignition status for state machine (main)

Request.Name: DataRead.LKA request outside safety limits
Request.Comment: Read LKA request outside safety limits

Request.Name: DataRead.ASL_LogisticsModeTrigerredByCAN
Request.Comment: Read Logistic Mode Trigger By CAN

Request.Name: DataWrite.ASL_LogisticsModeTrigerredByCAN
Request.Comment: Write Logistic Mode Trigger By CAN

Request.Name: DataRead.CAN Steering wheel angle sensor internal status
Request.Comment: Read Steering wheel angle sensor internal status

DataItem.Name: CAN Steering wheel angle sensor internal status

Request.Name: DataRead.Status flag of CAN offset calculation
Request.Comment: Read Status flag of CAN offset calculation

DataItem.Name: Status flag of CAN offset calculation

Device.Name: EPS Fault - Derating (H)EPS thermal protection Motor

Test.Description: Loss of Vbat during normal operation
Low voltage where assistance is no more guarranted
High voltage where assistance is no more guarranted
SystemMode gets equal to 4 "very_soft_ramp_down" (= enters statemode 4)

Device.Name: CAN Steering Wheel Angle Fault (STRG) (Signal Fault)
CAN Steering Wheel Angle Fault (STRG) Calibration Fault)

Test.Description: SAM Component Default (but assistance still provided)

Device.Name: DAG MUX CDM_A101
Device.Mnemonic: Absent CDM_A101 or CDM_A103 or CDM_A124

Test.Description: CAN Frame missing (ABS/VDC ones ; Gsensor one) (BRAKE_CANHS_RNr_02 ; BRAKE_CANHS_RNr_04 ; BRAKE_CANHS_RNr_07)

Device.Name: CAN G-sensor Fault1 (Signal Fault) - SWA Corrected
EPS Fault - Derating (H)EPS thermal protection ECU
CAN BUSS OFF fault for functional DTC

Test.Description: ADAS control request diagnosis(LKA inconsistency) (Fault memory)

Device.Name: Missing or unreliable control requests for APA( AVM failure)

Display.DataName: CAN Steering wheel angle sensor internal status
Display.RequestName: DataRead.CAN Steering wheel angle sensor internal status

Label.Text: System Mode should be = PowerUpTests Wait for Assist (2)
Check the log after clicking the button to check everything went well (it should read $710702)
Sensorless related : 015A enabled = SWAS and 015A disabled = No SWAS = Sensorless

Display.DataName: CAN Steering wheel angle sensor internal status
Display.RequestName: DataRead.CAN Steering wheel angle sensor internal status

Label.Text: SAM OUTPUT : CAN Steering Wheel Angle

Display.DataName: CAN Steering wheel angle sensor internal status
Display.RequestName: DataRead.CAN Steering wheel angle sensor internal status
